acceptance_criteria: Setup phase contains skeleton test modules for unit, integration, and contract coverage of pipeline driver work
quality_guards: Test modules import script targets deterministically
Skeleton tests execute and pass without external dependencies
diff:

diff --git a/tests/contract/test_pipeline_driver_contract.py b/tests/contract/test_pipeline_driver_contract.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..818c15a
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tests/contract/test_pipeline_driver_contract.py
@@ -0,0 +1,51 @@
+"""Contract-level skeleton tests for step-result envelope parsing."""
+
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import importlib.util
+from pathlib import Path
+import sys
+
+import pytest
+
+
+def _load_script_module(module_name: str, script_name: str):
+    scripts_dir = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2] / "scripts"
+    script_path = scripts_dir / script_name
+    scripts_dir_str = str(scripts_dir)
+    if scripts_dir_str not in sys.path:
+        sys.path.insert(0, scripts_dir_str)
+    spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location(module_name, script_path)
+    assert spec is not None
+    assert spec.loader is not None
+    module = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec)
+    sys.modules[spec.name] = module
+    spec.loader.exec_module(module)
+    return module
+
+
+contracts = _load_script_module("pipeline_driver_contracts", "pipeline_driver_contracts.py")
+
+
+def test_parse_step_result_accepts_minimal_envelope() -> None:
+    parsed = contracts.parse_step_result(
+        {
+            "schema_version": "1.0.0",
+            "ok": True,
+            "exit_code": 0,
+            "correlation_id": "019:setup:test",
+        }
+    )
+    assert parsed["schema_version"] == "1.0.0"
+    assert parsed["exit_code"] == 0
+
+
+def test_parse_step_result_rejects_missing_schema_version() -> None:
+    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
+        contracts.parse_step_result(
+            {
+                "ok": True,
+                "exit_code": 0,
+                "correlation_id": "019:setup:test",
+            }
+        )

@@ -0,0 +1,35 @@
+"""Integration-level skeleton tests for deterministic pipeline driver flow."""
+
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import importlib.util
+from pathlib import Path
+import sys
+
+
+def _load_script_module(module_name: str, script_name: str):
+    scripts_dir = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2] / "scripts"
+    script_path = scripts_dir / script_name
+    scripts_dir_str = str(scripts_dir)
+    if scripts_dir_str not in sys.path:
+        sys.path.insert(0, scripts_dir_str)
+    spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location(module_name, script_path)
+    assert spec is not None
+    assert spec.loader is not None
+    module = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec)
+    sys.modules[spec.name] = module
+    spec.loader.exec_module(module)
+    return module
+
+
+pipeline_driver_state = _load_script_module("pipeline_driver_state", "pipeline_driver_state.py")
+
+
+def test_resolve_phase_state_skeleton() -> None:
+    state = pipeline_driver_state.resolve_phase_state(
+        "019",
+        pipeline_state={"phase": "setup", "blocked": False, "drift_detected": False},
+    )
+    assert state["feature_id"] == "019"
+    assert state["phase"] == "setup"
+    assert state["blocked"] is False
diff --git a/tests/unit/test_pipeline_driver.py b/tests/unit/test_pipeline_driver.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..a699bd0
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tests/unit/test_pipeline_driver.py
@@ -0,0 +1,34 @@
+"""Unit-level skeleton tests for scripts/pipeline_driver.py."""
+
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import importlib.util
+import json
+from pathlib import Path
+import sys
+
+
+def _load_script_module(module_name: str, script_name: str):
+    scripts_dir = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2] / "scripts"
+    script_path = scripts_dir / script_name
+    scripts_dir_str = str(scripts_dir)
+    if scripts_dir_str not in sys.path:
+        sys.path.insert(0, scripts_dir_str)
+    spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location(module_name, script_path)
+    assert spec is not None
+    assert spec.loader is not None
+    module = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec)
+    sys.modules[spec.name] = module
+    spec.loader.exec_module(module)
+    return module
+
+
+pipeline_driver = _load_script_module("pipeline_driver", "pipeline_driver.py")
+
+
+def test_main_outputs_minimal_step_result(capsys) -> None:
+    exit_code = pipeline_driver.main(["--feature-id", "019", "--phase", "setup"])
+    assert exit_code == 0
+    payload = json.loads(capsys.readouterr().out.strip())
+    assert payload["feature_id"] == "019"
+    assert payload["step_result"]["exit_code"] == 0

test_runs.command: .venv/bin/python scripts/speckit_implement_gate.py validate-task-evidence --task-kind module --tests-passed pass --smoke-exit 0 --state-safety pass --transaction-integrity pass --async-safety pass --observability pass --json
